productName: Specimen X ( I/H ) Plaid Jacket BHO THCA Infused Joint - 1g
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Specimen X supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
